questions.text: All NEO Pricing Conditions and Pricing Procedures templates starts with alphabet letter "____"
Catalogue price (ZCAT) is the first Pricing Condition. It forms the basis of all pricing condition calculations
Pricing can be managed at every level of the "____" hierarchy
Pricing Procedure consists of many pricing conditions which contribute to the net sales price for the customer
One simplified table will be used for pricing at product hierarchy levels. Pricing priority will be from the "____" level of the hierarchy.
How many types of "100% Discount Pricing Conditions" are there?
The objective of the Fiori app "Manage Prices – Sales" is to manage all pricing conditions in one app. It's functionalities include:
options: The ability to mass create, edit, copy or delete pricing conditions
Viewing the import history to check if the import succeeded or failed
